name: Oriental Pea Pods and Carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the medium carrots by thinly slicing them on a diagonal (bias).
2. In a custard cup, stir together 1/4 cup water, soy sauce, cornstarch, and crushed red pepper.
3. Cook uncovered on high power for 1 to 1½ minutes or until thickened and bubbly, stirring every 30 seconds.
4. Transfer the carrot mixture into a 20-ounce casserole dish. Sprinkle with 2 tbsp water.
5. Cook covered on high power for 2½ minutes.
6. Drain any excess liquid from the carrots.
7. Toss together the cooked carrot, frozen pea pods, and walnuts; add butter or margarine.
8. Return to the casserole dish and cook covered on high power for about 1½ minutes or until the vegetables are crisp-tender.
9. Toss with the soy sauce mixture.
